wiki.summary: “ARE WE STILL FRIENDS” features Tyler, The Creator wrestling the thought of whether or not he and his former lover can remain friends, thematically wrapping up the album and closing out the arc of falling in, and then out, of love. The track combines a funky beat, crooning guitar, and synths with soft singing throughout. This song marks the fourth time Pharrell Williams has appeared on a Tyler song, the first time being “IFHY” off Wolf, the second being “KEEP DA O’S” off Cherry Bomb Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: “ARE WE STILL FRIENDS” features Tyler, The Creator wrestling the thought of whether or not he and his former lover can remain friends, thematically wrapping up the album and closing out the arc of falling in, and then out, of love. The track combines a funky beat, crooning guitar, and synths with soft singing throughout. This song marks the fourth time Pharrell Williams has appeared on a Tyler song, the first time being “IFHY” off Wolf, the second being “KEEP DA O’S” off Cherry Bomb, and the third being the vocals from “Enjoy Right Now, Today” off Flower Boy. Tyler has used Al Green's "Dream" as a sample for this song. Read more on Last.fm. User-contributed text is available under the Creative Commons By-SA License; additional terms may apply.
